config.label: GitHub Plugin Configuration
config.description: Configure GitHub workflow preferences for branching, merging, worktrees, and more

preferences.label: Branching Model
preferences.description: Default branching strategy for new repos and branch operations

preferences.label: Use Git Worktrees
preferences.description: Create worktrees instead of standard branch checkouts

preferences.label: Worktree Mode
preferences.description: Bare: worktrees as siblings. Traditional: worktrees in .worktrees/ subdirectory

preferences.label: Label Taxonomy
preferences.description: Label set to sync: 'standard' or path to custom label definition

preferences.label: Default PR Reviewers
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of default reviewers for new PRs

preferences.label: Auto-link Issues in PRs
preferences.description: Automatically detect and link related issues when creating PRs

git-operations.description: Git CLI operations for branching, merging, worktrees, and history

github-cli.description: GitHub CLI for PRs, issues, releases, projects, and repo management
